sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation.PlausibilityMonitor

Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt
SNT core classes
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation
Classes for curation of reconstructions, as implemented by the "Curation Assistant".

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PlausibilityMonitor
    SNTUI.getPlausibilityMonitor()
    Returns the plausibility monitor used by the Curation Manager (Curation Assistant).

  • Uses of PlausibilityMonitor in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation

    Methods in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation with parameters of type PlausibilityMonitor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PlausibilityCalibrator.CalibrationResult.applyTo(PlausibilityMonitor monitor)
    Applies all calibrated thresholds to the given monitor.
    static void
    PlausibilityCalibrator.load(File file, PlausibilityMonitor monitor)
    Loads thresholds and enabled states from a .curation properties file and applies them to the given monitor.
    static void
    PlausibilityCalibrator.loadBuiltIn(String presetName, PlausibilityMonitor monitor)
    Loads a built-in curation preset bundled in the SNT JAR and applies it to the given monitor.
    static void
    PlausibilityCalibrator.save(PlausibilityMonitor monitor, File file, String comment)
    Saves the current state of a PlausibilityMonitor (thresholds and enabled states) to a .curation properties file.
